name: Kanzi Red Apples
long_description:
Kanzi apples are grown across Australia, in selected pristine orchard regions of Batlow, Yarra Valley, Adelaide Hills, Manjimup and Huon, where the warm days and cool nights are ideal for nurturing great tasting apples.

Kanzi apples have a delicious sweet and tangy taste, with their knock-out flavour coming from the variety's parents - the sweet Gala and the tangy Braeburn.  

Kanzi apples are great for baking, snacking and slicing with their crunchy and juicy flesh that naturally stays white for longer.

Seasonality: March - Spring
ingredients: Apple

name: Lime & Pepper Cashews
long_description:
Coles Lime and Pepper Cashews 400g.





  • With lime and pepper seasoning

  • 4-star health rating

  • No artificial colours and flavours




These Coles Lime and Pepper Cashews are perfect for snacking and almost too good to share. With delicious crunchy whole cashews, covered in a zesty lime and pepper seasoning, they're ideal for on-the-go snacks, and great to have on hand when you need a little pick-me-up during the day. Coles Lime and Pepper Cashews also make a fantastic topper for soups and curries and an unexpected addition to cheeseboards and charcuterie platters.




You can also add Coles Lime and Pepper Cashews to your trail mix alongside various seeds and dried fruit for an energy boosting snack on your next hiking or camping trip. Or why not take things up a notch and use Coles Lime and Pepper Cashews to create an amazing chicken and cashew stir fry?




Coles Lime and Pepper Cashews not only taste great, they're also free from artificial colours and flavours and have a 4-star health rating.

name: Chocolate Cake Slices 2 pack
long_description:
Coles Chocolate Cake Slices 190g 2 pack


  • Moist chocolate cake with Belgian chocolate ganache
  • Topped with real chocolate flakes
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Chocolate Cake Slices are the perfect treat to satisfy your cake cravings. It features two layers of moist chocolate sponge cake with a rich Belgian chocolate ganache filling. The cake is then coated in real chocolate flakes before being cut into two slices that are perfect for sharing. Coles Chocolate Cake Slices are baked in store daily so they're always fresh and delicious. They're great alongside a cup of tea or coffee in the afternoon or as a sweet and satisfying dessert. For extra indulgence, try adding a dollop of whipped cream or vanilla ice cream and freshly sliced strawberries.


Coles Chocolate Cake is made in Australia from at least 77% Australian ingredients. It has no artificial colours and flavours and is Rainforest Alliance approved.

Brgen Lower Carb High Protein Sunflower & Linseed Bread is a lower carb bread developed with nutritionists and bakers. This Bakery Bread loaf has 85% lower carb^ than other Brgen loaves, with less than 3g carbs per serving, very high in fibre and high protein with 19 g protein per serving~ from plant-based protein sources. Packed with sunflower seeds and linseed, it offers crunch and nutty flavour in every slice. A smart protein bread choice when you want to cut back on carbs without sacrificing taste.

Key Features

- 85% lower carb^

- High protein

- Less than 3g carbs per serving

- 19 g protein per serving

- Very high in fibre

- Made with plant-based protein

^ Brgen Sunflower and Linseed contains at least 85% less carbohydrates (1.6 g/100 g) than each loaf in the Brgen bread range, based on average protein values per serving.

  • 19 g Protein Per Serving~

name: Cholesterol Lowering Wholegrain And Oats Bread
description: BURGEN CHOLESTEROL LOWERING WHOLEGRAIN AND OATS BREAD
long_description:
Developed with nutritionists and bakers, Burgen Cholesterol Lowering Whole Grain & Oats Bread has been formulated with whole grain oats and barley, natural sources of beta-glucan. Beta-glucan is scientifically proven to help reduce cholesterol by reducing the reabsorption of bad cholesterol in the gut, and just 2 slices provide 1/3 of your daily beta-glucan intake^.

This loaf is very high in fibre, delivering 24% of your daily fibre intake, and provides 9.5 g protein per serving to help grow, maintain and repair muscles**. A smart everyday bread for those looking to support heart health as part of a balanced diet.

Key Features

- Reduces cholesterol- 1/3 of your daily beta-glucan intake, found in oats & barley.

- Very high in fibre - 24% of your daily fibre intake

- 9.5 g protein per serving to help grow, maintain and repair muscles**


  • Reduces Cholesterol

  • With Beta-Glucan naturally found in Oats & Barley

  • Very High in Fibre

  • 9.5 g Protein per serving to help grow, maintain and repair muscles**

  • VERY HIGH IN FIBRE - 24% of your daily fibre intake

  • REDUCES CHOLESTEROL - 1/3 of your daily beta-glucan intake, found in oats & barley^.
ingredients: Water, Wheat Flour, Mixed Grains (15%) (BARLEYmax (Kibbled Barley), Whole Grain Oats (1.5%), Rolled Barley), Wheat Gluten, Oat Bran (4%), Canola Oil, Oat Fibre (1.5%), Vinegar, Baker's Yeast, Linseed, Maize Semolina, Fermented Wheat Flour, Iodised Salt, Vitamins (Thiamin, Folic Acid), Processing Aid (Wheat).

name: Beef Rump Roast With Herb Salt Seasoning
description: COLES BEEF RUMP ROAST WITH HERB SALT SEASONING
long_description:
Coles Australian Beef Rump Roast with Herb Salt Seasoning approx. 1.1kg


  • 100% Australian beef
  • Slow cook roast
  • No added hormones


This classic Coles Australian Beef Rump Roast with Herb Salt Seasoning is made from 100% Australian beef, raised without added hormones and carefully selected for quality and taste. Popular for its full-flavour and lean meat, rump roast is a tender cut with a slightly firmer texture making it perfect for steaks, stews and roast beef sandwiches.


Coles Australian Beef Rump Roast with Herb Salt Seasoning has been expertly prepared, and seasoned with a blend of garlic, rosemary and thyme, ready for cooking. To serve, try pairing Coles Australian Beef Rump Roast with Herb Salt Seasoning with mashed potatoes alongside your favourite seasonal veges and plenty of gravy made from the richly flavoured pan drippings. Leftover roast beef can be thinly sliced to make delicious bistro-style sandwiches. Add tomatoes for freshness and chimichurri or horseradish sauce for an extra hit of flavour.

name: RSPCA Approved Chicken Wing Nibbles Smokey Bbq Sauce
description: COLES RSPCA CHICKEN WING NIBBLES WITH SMOKEY BBQ SAUCE
long_description:
Coles Australian Chicken Wing Nibbles with Smokey BBQ Sauce 1Kg


  • RSPCA approved chicken
  • 100% Australian grown
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Coles Australian Chicken Wing Nibbles with Smokey BBQ Sauce are made from 100% Australian chicken, sourced from Aussie farmers and suppliers who share our passion for great tasting, quality chicken.


They're marinated in a smokey barbeque sauce and prepped ready to go in the oven or onto the barbeque for around 40 to 45 minutes until they're golden brown, and ready to devour. Perfect for party food, especially with a couple of creamy dipping sauces, Coles Australian Chicken Wing Nibbles with Smokey BBQ Sauce also make a delicious and easy meal for mid-week dinners or weekend lunches. Serve with some crispy potato wedges and a crunchy slaw made from shredded red cabbage, carrots and fresh herbs, drizzled with a tangy, creamy dressing. And Coles Australian Chicken Wing Nibbles with Smokey BBQ Sauce don't just taste great, they're also RSPCA approved with no artificial colours and flavours.
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: RSPCA Approved Australian Chicken (83%), Smokey BBQ Sauce (17%) [Water, Maltodextrin, Sugar, Spices, Bay Leaves, Dehydrated Vegetables (Garlic, Onion), Salt, Natural Colour (150a), Citric Acid (330), Smoke Flavour, Mineral Salt (508), Coffee Extract, Vinegar Powder, Worcestershire Sauce Powder, Vegetable Gum (415)].

name: Sweet Soy Kebabs
long_description:
Raised by Lilydale Farmers on Lilydale Farms.

At Lilydale, our chickens are raised by farmers who really care about their welfare. They are fed a nutritious diet and - once adequately feathered at around 21 days - can leave their barns during daylight hours and access fenced outdoor range areas. Many chickens are content with the comforts of their barn but during an average day and depending on conditions like the weather, some chickens will venture out and return at their leisure. Our commitment to free range farming has helped us to provide Australians with quality, great tasting chickens since 2002.

name: Pot Set Yoghurt Natural Greek
description: JALNA POT SET YOGHURT:NATURAL GREEK:.:170 GRAM
long_description:
We believe nature got it right. For over 60 years, we've made yoghurt the traditional, natural way in our special pots. We start with fresh milk and cream from Aussie dairy farms, add all-natural ingredients, then with a little time and a great deal of care we create uniquely thick and delicious pot set yoghurt.

With only 3 natural ingredients, our award winning all-natural Greek Yoghurt is made without the need for stabilisers. Fresh milk and a generous amount of cream is fermented with live cultures to produce a full-bodied, smooth yoghurt with the perfect amount of tang.

With a uniquely thick and creamy texture, it is delicious straight off the spoon, served with fruit, or as a versatile ingredient when cooking.

100% All Natural

3 culture strains

Free from: Gluten, Gelatine, Thickeners, Preservatives, Artificial Colours, Artificial Flavours and Artificial Sweeteners

Australian Made
ingredients: Whole Milk, Cream (from Milk), Live Cultures (from Milk) (Lactobacillus Acidophilus, Bifidobacterium Lactis, Lactobacillus Casei)

name: Greek Yogurt Pouch Blueberry
description: CHOBANI GREEK YOGURT POUCH BLUEBERRY140 GRAM
long_description:
Chobani Greek Yogurt is deliciously simple. Made using just milk and cultures, which we triple strain using an authentic process so it's naturally thick and creamy, then blended with blueberry.


Strained to be naturally thick

High in natural protein

No preservatives, artificial colours or flavours

Source of calcium

Contains Live & Active Cultures

Made in Australia.

At Chobani we believe yogurt should be simple: just milk and cultures, which we strain using a centuries-old authentic process to make it deliciously thick. It takes 3 cups of milk to make 1 cup of Chobani Yogurt which is why it's so creamy and packed with protein.

No preservatives, artificial colours or flavours.

High in natural protein

To discover our full range of products & more, visit chobani.com.au

name: Colombia Iced Coffee
long_description:
Like a hungry Colombian spectacled bear who picks and pounces its prey, that's how we feel about choosing the right coffee bean - single minded in the pursuit of the perfect brew. Our hunt has taken us to La Union in the Narino region of Colombia where the high altitude, soil and climate conditions produce a soft brew that has citrus and sweet notes, with a smoky finish. Locally roasted and ground to profile, Hunt and Brew coffee is slowly brewed and triple filtered for maximum flavour extraction. Finally, we cut the brew with fresh Australian full cream milk, and nothing more.

Where are our beans from?
La Unión's close proximity to the equator means coffee beans can be grown at a relatively high altitude of up to 1900m above sea level. 
Blessed with such a diverse climate, La Unión coffee is characterised by rich chocolate tones that are balanced and sweet.
Coffee from this region is washed, with the fruit skin and pulp manually removed from the beans after harvesting and before drying.
The result is the unique flavour found in our Hunt and Brew Colombia blend.
ingredients: Full Cream Milk, Cold Brewed Coffee (30%), [Water, Roasted Colombian Coffee Grounds].

name: Peru Mocha Iced Coffee
description: HUNT & BREW PERU MOCHA ICED COFFEE 400ML
long_description:
Like a Peruvian Puma who stealthily stalks and hunts its prey, that's how we feel about choosing the right coffee bean - single minded in the pursuit of the perfect brew. We've hunted the globe and found the finest single origin coffee beans. Our travels have taken us to the Cajamarca region of Peru where the soil, climate and altitude produce a clean bean that has notes of caramel and hazelnut, with a long dark cocoa finish. Locally roasted and ground to profile, then slowly brewed and triple filtered for maximum flavour extraction. Finally, we cut the brew with fresh Australian full cream milk, and a touch of rich black cocoa.

Where are our beans from?
The characteristics of Cajamarca coffee beans are unique to the high altitude and mountainous landscape of the region.
With unique micro-climates and fertile soils, Cajamarca coffee's present deep sweet profiles and thick bodies of flavour with prominent caramel and cocoa notes.
The region's coffee is the perfect addition to our Hunt and Brew Peru Mocha.

Hunt us down and join the tribe - visit our website to discover our full range of products, merchandise and more!
ingredients: Full Cream Milk, Cold Brewed Coffee (19%) [Water, Roasted Peruvian Coffee Grounds], Black Cocoa (0.5%)

name: Probiotic Yoghurt No Added Sugar Strawberry 4x125g
description: ACTIVIA PROBIOTIC YOGHURT NO ADDED SUGAR STRAWBERRY 4 X 125G
long_description:
Developed by Danone, Activia combines over 30 years of scientific research with innovation to deliver a yoghurt that supports digestive health every day. Only Activia contains exclusive probiotics Bifidus ActiRegularis, proven to survive the journey through the gastro intestinal tract and reach the gut microbiome alive, to provide gut health benefits.

Enjoy a deliciously creamy strawberry yoghurt with no added sugar, no artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Probiotics 100X stronger

  • No added sugar

  • No artificial sweeteners, colours, or preservatives

  • Gelatine free

  • Good source of calcium

 

*Activia helps improve digestive comfort when 250g is consumed daily as part of a healthy lifestyle and balanced diet.

^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 5.6bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.6bn after stomach acid based on 160 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size), compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.

^Activia contains Bifidobacterium lactis CNCM I-2494. 4.4bn CFU when manufactured, with 1.3bn after stomach acid based on 125 g serve size (CFU values vary depending on serve size). Compared to lactobacillus delbrueckii bulgaricus culture found in leading regular yoghurt without added probiotics.

  • Probiotics

  • Gut Health

  • No added sugar

  • Digestive health

  • no artificial sweeteners, no artificial colours & no preservatives

  • Gelatine free.

  • good source of calcium.
ingredients: Milk, strawberry (6%), milk solids, thickeners (1442, 407), flavours, live lactic acid cultures (milk) (Bifidobacterium animalis subspecies lactis CNCM I-2494, Streptococcus thermophilus, Lactococcus lactis and Lactobacillus bulgaricus), natural colours (black carrot and blackcurrant), milk minerals, enzyme (lactase), sweetener (steviol glycosides), salt, lemon pulp.

long_description:
Yoplait Vanilla Yoghurt is a smooth and creamy yoghurt made with milk and real vanilla flavour. With no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, it's a simple and versatile option for everyday family meals and snacks.

Proudly made in Australia, Yoplait Vanilla comes in a convenient 12 x 100g pack and is available in a range of popular flavours including Vanilla, Strawberry, Mango, Passionfruit and Mixed Berry.

Yoplait yoghurt provides a source of essential nutrients as part of a varied and balanced diet, including:

  • Calcium and phosphorous to support strong bones and teeth

  • Iodine for normal brain function

  • Potassium for normal muscle function

  • Vitamin B2 to support energy metabolism

  • Vitamin B12 to support immune system function

  • Made with real vanilla and goodness of milk

  • 4 Health Star Rating

  • 6 essential nutrients

  • Simple & delicious yoghurt for the whole family

  • No artifical flavours, colours or preservatives

  • Made in Australia.

  • Loved by Australians since 1982.

name: Garlic & Herb Cultured Butter
description: LARD ASS GARLIC & HERB CULTURED BUTTER 150G
long_description:
LardAss Herb & Garlic Cultured Butter is infused with aromatic herbs and garlic to create a delicious yet robust flavour.  Perfect for quick and easy herb and garlic bread, or melt it over potatoes, mushrooms or steak to impress your friends and loved ones.

It's a great way to zhoosh up any meal when you're in a hurry. Pasta with kids - just add some herb & garlic butter, steak and chips - forget tomato sauce - melt some herb & garlic butter, baked fish - just add butter for a kick of herbs and garlic. It's that easy.

The herb & garlic mix is gently folded by hand through cultured butter produced using traditional French methods and practices. LardAss Butter is known for its focus on high quality and small batch cultured products and this Herb & Garlic Cultured Butter is no exception.

Using grass-fed cream, the butter is slowly churned to preserve the creaminess to ensure their butter is high in butterfat giving their products a rich, creamy texture with a slight tang from the culture, but overall a buttery butter. Just like butter should taste like.

Serving suggestions:
Make your own herb & garlic bread, bake fish in foil with a generous knob of butter, make some herby scrambled eggs, melt a generous amount through some freshly boiled pasta, add some to your favourite soup and serve with herb & garlic bread.

  • Small batch

  • Gut-friendly

  • Locally made

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • Natural ingredients

  • Grass-fed butter.

  • Real garlic.

  • Family-owned business.

name: Smoked Garlic Cultured Butter
description: LARD ASS SMOKED GARLIC CULTURED BUTTER
long_description:
Spread LardAss Roasted Garlic Cultured Butter on top of hot steak and watch as it melts to make a sauce. Or toss it with fresh pasta or use it for stir-frying vegetables. Just about any use of butter will be enhanced with the addition of this very popular savory flavor.

Experience the irresistible allure of LardAss Butter's Roasted Garlic Cultured Butter, a culinary masterpiece crafted with care on the Bellarine Peninsula in Victoria. Harnessing the essence of real roasted garlic granules and the rich cream from grass-fed cows, this butter epitomises artisanal excellence.

With real roasted garlic granuales and small batch churned cultured butter means this garlic butter can be used to impart flavor and lift the ordinary to the extraordinary.  Its versatility knows no bounds, perfect for cooking, light frying, or simply spreading on warm bread. Pair it with your favorite cheese to elevate a cheese board to new heights, as its subtle garlic notes complement a variety of cheese profiles.

Serving suggestions:
Add some to melt over your favourite steak, melt through mashed potatoes, make garlic bread, perfect for toasties with melted cheese, ideal with roasted vegetables or add to your favourite soup before serving.

name: Black Garlic Cultured Butter
description: LARD ASS BLACK GARLIC CULTURED BUTTER 150G
long_description:
LardAss Black Garlic Cultured butter puts WOW! onto any steak, fish, chicken or vegetable dish. Creamy, with a hint of sweetness yet earthy without the garlic kick. Forget truffle butter - black garlic cultured butter this is new umani flavoured butter and can be served on everything - delicious on vegetables, meat, fish, bread, and more! 

After slowly churning cultured, grass-fed cream the black garlic which is sourced from Central Victoria is delicately hand folded through the cultured butter to preserve the creaminess. Then its rolled and hand-wrapped and ready for serving on your favourite steak or teamed with roasted cauliflower.

With its mild garlic taste and a delicate balance of savoury and sweetness this umami butter will elevate any dish. Spread it on freshly baked bread, place a pat on a seared steak, or add a dollop to roasted vegetables or a baked potato. You can even toss pasta with the black garlic butter and top with grated parmesan for a truly swoon-worthy dish.

If you're looking to slather a flavoured butter over your next steak, this black garlic butter will soon be your best friend. Be sure to show it off at your next bbq or dinner party. 

Keep refrigerated for 3 months or frozen for up to 12 months.

Serving suggestions: Melted over corn, light saute brussel sprouts or cabbage, perfect with a slice of tomato on a buttered cracker.
  • Small batch

  • Grass-fed butter

  • Locally made

  • Gut-friendly

  • Real garlic.

name: Smoked Salted Cultured Butter
description: LARD ASS SMOKED SALTED CULTURED BUTTER 150G
long_description:
Cut to the chase when it comes to choosing a butter - LardAss Smoked Salted Cultured Butter gets you to the front of the queue.

This one is the perfect butter for all seasons, and works wonders with white meat, game, or an oven-baked fish to give it that buttery taste with a smoky flavour.

Scrambled eggs for breakfast? Forget plain-Jane butter. A knob of Smoked Salted in the pan, a couple of eggs and you will be enjoying a breakfast fit for not just kings but the entire royal family.

At LardAss Butter we craft cultured butter in small batches, each batch of cream undergoes a meticulous process of cold smoking and slow churning, preserving its creamy texture while infusing it with a delicate smokiness that tantalises the senses.

Hand-wrapped with care, our butter is a celebration of quality ingredients, sourced from grass-fed cows to ensure unparalleled richness and depth of flavor. With every decadent bite, experience the perfect harmony of creamy butteriness and subtle smokiness, a symphony of taste that lingers on the palate long after the last morsel is savored.

Versatile and indulgent, our Smoked Salted Cultured Butter adds a touch of sophistication to any dish. Whether spread on warm, crusty bread, melted over grilled vegetables, or incorporated into your favorite recipes, its distinctive flavor profile elevates every culinary creation to new heights of gourmet excellence.

Treat yourself to the luxurious experience of our Smoked Salted Cultured Butter and embark on a journey of unparalleled taste and sensory delight. Crafted with passion and precision, it's more than just butter - it's a culinary masterpiece.

Experience the taste of Italy in every savory spoonful and let our Roasted Tomato Cultured Butter whisk you away to a land of gastronomic delight.

name: Sweet Vanilla Cultured Butter
description: LARD ASS SWEET VANILLA CULTURED BUTTER 150G
long_description:
Sweet Vanilla Cultured Butter from LardAss Butter can't be beaten.

An inspired blend of sweet Madagascan vanilla bean and lightly salted creamy butter, this indulgent treat will satisfy any sweet tooth. Particularly perfect for baking!

Handcrafted with care and precision, each velvety spoonful is infused with the essence of pure vanilla beans, creating a symphony of flavour that dances on your palate.

Our small batch churned cultured butter is delicately folded in by hand with real vanilla creating a creamy, vanilla butter indulgence with a hint of sweetness.  Perfectly paired with fluffy pancakes, warm banana bread, or a slice of rye fruit loaf. Whether spread, melted, or savoured straight from the spoon, our Sweet Vanilla Cultured Butter elevates every bite.

Serving suggestions:
Slathered on warm sourdough toast; melt and drizzle over fluffy pancakes, melted into a steaming bowl of oatmeal, great melted over steamed carrots, spreading vanilla butter is a sensory experience that delights the palate and soothes the soul. Close your eyes and savor the aroma of fresh vanilla beans as they mingle with creamy butter, creating a symphony of flavor that transports you to a realm of culinary paradise.

So go ahead, take a moment to enjoy the simple pleasure of spreading vanilla butter. 

  • Hand crafted butter

  • No artificial flavours

  • No artificial colours

  • No preservatives

  • Grass-fed butter

  • Small batch churned butter.

  • Made in Australia.

  • Gut-friendly.
ingredients: Grass-fed cream (from cow's milk), organic sea salt, sugar, pure vanilla bean, lactic cultures.

name: Unsalted Cultured Butter
long_description:
The Unsalted Cultured Butter churned by LardAss Butter, is a luxurious addition to your culinary repertoire. Crafted in small batches, each 225g block undergoes a slow churn preserve the creamy, smooth texture that's second to none. With 82% butterfat, this is definitely Australia's creamiest butter.

What makes our butter truly special is its natural fermentation process, which infuses it with a rich and nuanced buttery flavor, free from the distractions of added salt. Every bite is a testament to the LardAss Butter commitment to quality and tradition.

Our cultured butter is not just creamy in texture and rich in flavour, but its crafted using cream from grass-fed cows of south-west Victoria. This is why the golden yellow hues of our butter really shine.

Every knob of our Unsalted Cultured Butter carries with it the essence of grass-fed butter churned in Australia, making it a truly special addition to any table. Whether used in cooking, baking, or simply enjoyed on crusty bread, our butter reflects the care and passion that goes into every step of its creation.

Indulge in the taste of tradition and craftsmanship with our Unsalted Cultured Butter, proudly made on the Bellarine Peninsula.

Serving suggestions:
Higher fat butter produces better baking results. Use unsalted where the recipes asks for butter. Use in cakes, breads, pastries and biscuits for a more superior result.

Pair unsalted butter on a cracker with a sharp cheese like a vintage cheddar or try it with a Manchego, Asiago, and Provolone cheese.
  • Grass-fed

  • Gut-friendly

  • Unsalted

  • Creamy

  • Naturally fermented

  • 82% butterfat.

  • Gluten-free.

  • Free from artificial additives and preservatives.
ingredients: Cream (from cow's milk), lactic cultures.

name: Cheddar Cheese
long_description:
Castello Mature Cheddar is a crumbly and sturdy cheese with a sweet side. It is bright, complex, lively and a little citrussy, with a hint of caramel. The subtle crunch of the protein crystals tickle your taste buds. The more you get to know it, the more you will find to like and love. It is a great addition to your sandwich or your cheese board, and can add a little extra to your risotto that will make your guests ask, what's your secret?
  • Crumbly with the right level of smoothness.

  • Buttery taste, with hints of caramel.

  • Complex and sophisticated.

  • Suitable for vegetarians.

  • Creatively crafted in the UK.
ingredients: Pasteurised milk, salt, rennet (microbial), lactic acid culture.

name: Thai Green Chicken Curry
description: FOXES DEN THAI GREEN CHICKEN CURRY
long_description:
A true classic of Thai comfort cooking, this authentic green curry blends succulent chicken, crisp green beans, juicy zucchini, and tender baby corn, all simmered in a creamy coconut milk sauce infused with kaffir lime leaf and aromatic spices. The result? A beautiful balance of heat and harmony - a little kick of chilli warmth mellowed perfectly by coconut richness. Served with fluffy rice, it's fragrant, fresh, and full of life - the kind of meal that lifts your mood and your tastebuds in one go.
Beloved around the world, and right at home at Foxes Den.

  • No artificial colour, flavours or preservatives

  • 28g protein

  • Handmade meal

  • 657 Calories

  • 68g Carbs
ingredients: Jasmine Rice (35%), Free Range Chicken (17%), Coconut Milk, Zucchini (10%), Baby Corn, Coconut Cream, Water, Green Curry Paste (4%)(Crustacea), Green Bean (3%), Fish Sauce, Canola Oil, Tamarind, Palm Sugar, Extra Virgin Olive Oil, Kaffir Lime (0.1%), Coriander

name: Meal Miso Cabbage Chicken & Rice
long_description:
Foxes DeInspired by the comforting flavours of Japan, this dish brings together tender free-range chicken thigh, crispy golden skin, and a rich, savoury miso glaze that's pure umami bliss. We balance it with fresh cabbage, a touch of ginger, and just a hint of chilli to awaken the senses. Every bite delivers that perfect harmony - satisfying, soulful, and subtly spicy. Served over fluffy sushi rice, it's the kind of meal that feels both nourishing and indulgent, all in one bowl. Wholesome comfort with a modern twist - simple ingredients, elevated by flavour.

  • No artificial colour, flavours or preservatives

  • 40g protein

  • Handmade meal

  • 578 Calories

  • 55g Carbs

name: Butter Chicken
long_description:
There's a reason this dish has earned legendary status. Our traditional-style Indian curry combines tender, free-range chicken simmered in a silky tomato and cream sauce, infused with a melody of warming, aromatic spices. Once a clever way to breathe new life into leftovers, it's now a global comfort classic - and one of the most-loved dishes at Foxes Den. Each spoonful delivers that perfect balance of richness and spice, with a wholesome edge that feels like home. Packed with 52g of protein per serve, this hearty meal satisfies the soul as much as the appetite. Wholesome, authentic, and undeniably delicious.

  • No artificial colour, flavours or preservatives

  • 52g protein

  • Handmade meal

  • 636 Calories

  • 57g Carbs
ingredients: Basmati Rice, Free Range Chicken (26%), Tomatoes (15%), Onion, Full Cream Milk, Greek Style Yoghurt (Milk), Cream (Milk), Cashews Nut Butter, Water, Butter (1%)(Milk), Aromatic Spices (1%), Garlic, Honey, Mustard Oil, Himalayan Pink Salt, Canola Oil, Ginger, Extra Virgin Olive Oil.

name: Wagyu Beef Sausage With Mash
description: FOXES DEN WAGYU BEEF BANGERS & MASH
long_description:
WagyuA modern take on a timeless classic. Our Wagyu beef sausage is crafted from premium Wagyu, bringing luxurious flavour and tenderness to every bite. It's paired with creamy Paris butter mash, whipped to melt-in-your-mouth perfection and enriched with fragrant herbs for a touch of indulgence. On the side, you'll find bright, green peas - because some traditions are too good to mess with. This dish delivers everything you love about a hearty weeknight meal, elevated with Foxes Den quality and care. Comfort food, perfected - simple, soulful, and irresistibly good.

  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • 25.6g of protein

  • Handmade meal

name: Middle Eastern Chicken Soup
description: FOXES DEN MIDDLE EASTERN CHICKEN SOUP
long_description:
A true feel-good favourite, this wholesome chicken soup warms you from the inside out. Built on a rich, aromatic chicken stock that's full of depth and flavour, it's loaded with seasonal vegetables, tender couscous, and shredded free-range chicken cooked to perfection. Infused with gentle, healing spices, every spoonful soothes the soul and comforts the body - the perfect remedy for chilly days or moments that call for something nourishing and real.
Simple, satisfying, and full of goodness - just the way soup should be.

  • No artificial colour, flavours or preservatives

  • Handmade meal

  • Free Range
ingredients: Stock (water, natural chicken stock), free range chicken (17%), Tuscan kale, onion, carrot, celery, cous cous (Wheat flour), zucchini, canola oil, ginger, garlic, turmeric powder, salt, white pepper.

name: Napoli Chicken Meatballs With Pasta
long_description:
A true taste of Italy lovingly reimagined the Foxes Den way. Our handmade free-range chicken meatballs are tender, flavourful, and carry a subtle citrus brightness that lifts every bite. They're gently simmered in an authentic Napoli sauce, bursting with rich tomato flavour, garlic, and herbs, then paired with perfectly cooked linguine that soaks up every drop of that velvety sauce. It's a dish that feels both homely and sophisticated - wholesome comfort made with care, crafted to satisfy.
Simple ingredients, timeless flavours, and all heart - that's Foxes Den Italian done right.

  • No artificial colour, flavours or preservatives

  • 27.2g protein

  • Handmade meal

name: Soup Miso Chicken Noodle
description: FOXES DEN MISO CHICKEN NOODLE SOUP
long_description:
Light, comforting, and deeply nourishing, this Japanese-inspired wellness soup is designed to restore and revitalise. Made with free-range chicken, fragrant lemongrass, and aromatic kaffir lime leaf, it's enriched with miso for a natural probiotic boost that supports gut health. Tender bok choy and silky udon noodles add heart and texture, while ginger, garlic, and a touch of chilli bring gentle warmth and balance. Every spoonful feels soothing, satisfying, and full of life.
Wholesome, aromatic, and good for the soul - wellness done the Foxes Den way.

  • No artificial colour, flavours or preservatives

  • Handmade meal

  • Free Range

name: Burrata Cheese
long_description:
A fresh, handmade cow milk cheese made from mozzarella and cream. This award-winning cheese has an outer shell of mozzarella in a money bag style that is filled with strips of mozzarella bathed in cream.
Cut through the outer layer of mozzarella and it's obvious why this cheese is called burrata, meaning ‘buttered' in Italian. The inside is soft and oozy!
Burrata is best enjoyed with crispy bread and a drizzle of olive oil or torn up over pasta.

name: Oat Milk
long_description: Bonsoy has been doing it better since 83. While health fads come and go, and those hitching onto the vegan/health train have well and truly left the station, our commitment to quality, all-natural soy milk hasnt changed. Weve earned our place in the hearts, homes and businesses of our fans around the world (even on the bodies of several Bonsoy tattoo-sporting fanatics). We know because you tell us. You might love us because we use whole, certified vegan organic soybeans. And because lifes sweet enough already, we dont do artificial sweeteners. Plant-based, non-genetically modified food isnt a fad. At Bonsoy its our past, present and future. We humbly suggest it ought to be part of yours, too.

A bright, velvety, smooth blend of sweet potatoes, carrots, and onions slowly simmered in our classic vegetable stock, blended with creamy coconut milk and a warm blend of ginger, thyme, and garlic.

Ideal for a cozy time in front of the TV or a workday al-desko lunch treat, it's warming, wholesome, and utterly satisfying. Savour the goodness. Share the warmth.

name: Morning Start Juice
description: THE JUICE BROTHERS MORNING START JUICE 1L
long_description:
The Juice Brothers Morning Start contains Pear, Orange, Apple, Pineapple, Mango & Passionfruit. Using 100% Aussie fruit, no juice concentrate and no added sugar - for a deliciously authentic fruit juice!

Our orange juice is squeezed rather than crushed to preserve the fruit peels. Our orange, apple and pear fruit peels (including the seeds and cores) are reused as local animal feed.

We're also owned, grown and squeezed right here in Australia because we love what we do and want to keep it local.

We use all Aussie fruit, plus we're great tasting - and that's what makes us doubly delicious!

  • 100% Aussie fruit

  • No juice concentrate

  • No added sugar, just natural sweetness of fruit

  • Recycled and recyclable plastic bottle (excl. cap & label)

  • Proudly Aussie made & owned
ingredients: Fruit Juices [Pear (43.6%), Orange (40%), Apple (11.5%), Pineapple (3.1%), Passionfruit (0.5%)], Mango Puree (1.3%).

16 serves of fruit & veg
1 serve of fruit or veg = 125mL of real fruit or veg juice.

  • No preservatives

  • No artificial flavours

  • 100% Australian Fruit and Veg

name: Strawberry Watermelon Probiotic Drink
long_description:
Delivering more goodness where it counts - your gut. Developed at the University of Queensland, PERKii Probiotic Drink contains 1.2 billion probiotics scientifically designed to reach your gut alive. Blended with natural juice flavours, every bottle is low in sugar and just 37 calories per serving. Great taste, even better for you.

Did you know that the majority of probiotics perish in your stomach, well before they've even reached your gut? PERKii is different!
The brainchild of serious scientific research at UNI of QLD, our probiotics are protected for the long journey through your stomach. Delivering More goodness to the gut.
ingredients: Water, Apple Juice (25%), Lactobacillus Casei, Glazing Agent (Calcium Alginate), Natural Flavours, Natural Colours (163ii), Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid), Preservative (Potassium Sorbate), Natural Sweetener (960)

name: Cave Aged Farmhouse Cheddar
long_description: Westminster Cave Aged Cheddar is matured 200 feet underground in the Wookey Hole Caves of the Somerset Mendip Hills, where naturally stable temperature and humidity create ideal ageing conditions. The cheese's porous texture allows it to absorb subtle earthy and nutty characteristics from its surroundings. Firm and cream-coloured, this cheddar offers a complex aroma with sweet, creamy and earthy notes, followed by a bold, well-rounded flavour balanced with hints of sweetness and salt.
country_of_origin: Made in United Kingdom

name: Pickled Onion & Chives Cheddar
long_description:
A family favourite, our Pickled Onion & Chive Club Cheddar offers a delightful balance of sharp, tangy pickled onions and fresh, aromatic chives, all wrapped in a creamy, crunchy texture.

This versatile cheese is perfect on crackers, enhances any cheese board, and adds a vibrant twist to salads and sandwiches.

name: Spreadable Feta
long_description:
A unique combination of PDO feta and strained Greek yogurt. Founded in 1952 by the Roussas family, the dairy specialises in feta cheese, using traditional methods from their Sarakatsani ancestors. With a modern facility in Almyros, Greece, the family continues to refine these techniques while maintaining the high quality of their internationally recognised cheese.

This spreadable cheese is the latest addition to the Roussas range and with a creamy texture and tart finish, it has a multitude of applications

This versatile spread can be enjoyed on its own as a dip, as a topping on bruschetta, or served alongside roast meats and vegetables
. .
  • Great as a dip, topping on a bruschetta or alongside roasted meats

  • Authentic Greek Cheese

  • Made using a combination of PDO Feta and strained Greek Yogurt

  • Creamy texture and a tart finish

  • Made with traditional methods

  • Good for vegetarians.
ingredients: Greek yogurt 80% (Pasteurised sheep milk, culture), Feta PDO cheese 20% (pasteurised sheep and goat milk, sea salt, cultures, non-animal rennet
country_of_origin: Made in Greece

name: Cheese Double Brie
long_description:
A rich and creamy cow's milk double brie made from premium Australian milk.

By doubling the cream in this luscious, silky Brie, we have increased it's versatility beyond the cheeseboard favourite. Baked in a hot oven under fresh sliced figs, quality honey and aromatic rosemary or stirred through a creamy chicken, fresh herb and buttered mushroom pasta bake, all of a sudden just one wheel of this Double Cream Brie isn't enough. A true team player. 
  • Proudly handcrafted with fresh cow's milk

  • Made in Australia

name: Cheddar Mango & Macadamia
long_description:
This cheese is fruity, crunchy, and inspired by local produce found in the sun-drenched beaches and rainforests of tropical North Queensland.

Our irresistible Mango & Macadamia Club Cheddar showcases Kenilworth Dairies' creativity and the rich bounty of the Sunshine Coast hinterland.

This full-bodied cheddar beautifully balances the natural sweetness of mango and the creamy crunch of macadamia, creating a truly unique flavour experience. Enjoy it paired with crisp white wines like Sauvignon Blanc, fresh tropical fruits, or crunchy crackers for a perfect snack or cheese board addition.
  • Gluten Free

  • Mild Cheddar Cheese

  • Australian Owned

  • Queensland flavours all in one

name: Cheese Camembert
long_description:
A smooth creamy cow's milk cheese made from premium Australian milk. 

This all-time classic cheese is the perfect size for that big get-together cheeseboard with roasted nuts and fig paste or cut into long slices to go into your crusty lunchtime baguette, alongside premium smoked leg ham and lashings of heady mustard. With those beautiful earthy notes offsetting the creamy, straw-coloured paste, you are easily reminded why this cheese is so popular.
  • Proudly handcrafted with fresh cow's milk

  • Made in Australia

name: Triple Cream Camembert
long_description:
This cheese helps fight climate change.

Want your cheese to make a statement? Our Bio-dynamic Organic Triple Cream Camembert gets is dreamy, creamy texture from certified bio-dynamic organic milk from carbon neutral dairy farms and plenty of cream! This cheese has a delicate mushroom flavour and it keeps getting better with age, just like a good wine.

Pair this 100% organic Triple Cream Camembert with a delicious fruit paste to create a flavour that'll keep your coming back for more!

Paris Creek Farms Organic Dairy -deliciously better for you and our environment!

- 100% certified bio-dynamic organic milk
- Crafted using milk from carbon neutral dairy farms
- Hand-poured in the Adelaide Hills
- Australian owned
- Suitable for vegetarians
- Nothing artificial
- No preservatives
- No genetic modification
- No chemicals, pesticides, hormones or antibiotics

Paris Creek Farms Organic Dairy. Deliciously better for you and for our planet.

To learn more about our sustainability journey visit the Paris Creek Farms website.
ingredients: Certified Bio-dynamic Organic Milk, Certified Bio-dynamic Organic Cream, Natural Sea Salt, Non-Animal Rennet, Cultures. Nothing artificial, no preservatives, no GMOs, suitable for vegetarians, 100% certified bio-dynamic milk.

name: Light Less Fat Cheese Spread
long_description:
Reduced fat cheese spread, 8 portions

The Laughing Cow Light triangles are mild, smooth and marvellously tasty portions of creamy cheese spread. They have all the delicious creaminess of The Laughing Cow Original cheese spread, but are 56% less fat and only 26kcal per triangle, making them the perfect low-calorie treat. With a creamy taste and smooth texture, these moreish cheese spread triangles pair perfectly with anything from crackers to avocados or celery. Tasty and time saving with their super convenient format, you can take them anywhere with you, and eat them on the go: they are ideal as a little cheeky snack or spread on toast or a cracker.

Source of calcium
Made with real cheese
26kcal of fat per portion
No artificial colours or flavours
Suitable for vegetarians

name: Signature Mandarin Juice Chilled
long_description:
Get Up to Some Good with Grove Juice!

Since 1969, Grove Juice has been a family-run business rooted in the groves of Moree, NSW, Australia. Known for our signature orange products, we proudly grow, harvest, select, and squeeze the oranges ourselves, ensuring each bottle contains 100% goodness straight from Australia's heartland no concentrate, no added sugar, and no preservatives.

Beyond our signature orange juice, we offer a variety of delicious juice flavours and blends. Our Mandarin juice delivers a perfect balance of zesty citrus notes and natural sweetness, offering a vibrant and refreshing experience in every sip.

Our juices are cold stored and chilled to lock in the freshness, ensuring you enjoy a great-tasting juice that's packed with goodness. Whether its your go-to morning drink, a refreshing afternoon pick-me-up, or a sneaky sip straight from the bottle, Grove Juice is perfect for everyone, anytime!

We believe our juice is the best out there, and that's why our goodness is guaranteed: Love it OR Your Money Back!

Proudly Australian-made and loved by all, Grove Juice delivers a delicious drink every time so you can Get Up to Some Good with every sip!

name: Sambal Tomat
long_description:
Certified Organic Happiness in a Jar!

Love Organics Sambal Tomat is full of certified organic fermented goodness to keep your gut and tastebuds happy! 
  • Certified Organic
  • Certified Vegan
  • Probiotic Boosted
  • Aged Fermented
  • Handcrafted
  • Non Pasteurised
  • 4.75 Billion CFU in every 20g serve
  • Australian Made
Experience the taste sensation of this fermented Sambal Tomat relish.  With a spicy heat and a gorgeous garlic aroma, this relish will be put on everything you love to eat! Drizzle over everything or use it as an addition to your cooking to add that little bit of extra chilli or garlic flavour.

Love Organics Sambal Tomat is unique as a relish or chilli sauce as it is a raw fermented product. In addition to the wild occurring biota, Love Organics Sambal Tomat is also boosted with three probiotic strains that are Australian made, certified organic and TGA approved, helping to create a powerful functional fermentation.

Love Organics Sambal Tomat is an Australian made artisan product, handcrafted with love and aged fermented for maximum depth of flavour. 

Serving Suggestion:

Drizzle Love Organics Sambal Tomat over scrambled eggs or tofu, mix with yoghurt, mayonnaise or cream cheese to make a spicy dipping sauce or add it to guacamole or salsa for some instant spicy goodness.
  • Certified Organic

  • Certified Vegan

  • Probiotic Boosted

  • Aged Fermented

  • Handcrafted

  • Non Pasteurised.

  • 5.25 Billion CFU of probiotic strains in each serving.

  • Australian Made.
ingredients: Tomato, Daikon, Chilli, Garlic, Onion, Coconut Aminos, Australian Sea Salt, Galangal, Coriander, Cayenne Pepper, Nigella Seed, Lemongrass, L. plantarum, L. rhamnosus, L. paracasei.

name: Plant Based Entertaining Roast
description: NATURES KITCHEN PLANT BASED ENTERTAINING ROAST 600G
long_description:
Coles Nature's Kitchen Plant Based Roast 600g

"¢ Plant based roast with sweet mango chutney
"¢ Good source of fibre and protein
"¢ Vegan

Coles Nature's Kitchen is committed to unlocking the power of plants to make delicious, plant-based eats available for every meal. This Coles Nature's Kitchen Plant Based Roast is so full of flavour and rich in protein and dietary fibre. It"™s the perfect centrepiece for entertaining and an ideal meat-free main course for any occasion. With fragrant herbs and a sweet mango chutney sauce, Coles Nature's Kitchen Plant Based Roast is guaranteed to impress. And while it's ideal for vegans and vegetarians, it's equally enjoyed by anyone wanting to include more meat-free options in their diet.

Coles Nature's Kitchen Plant Based Roast is ready in the oven in just 45 minutes. It pairs beautifully with all the traditional trimmings that go with roast dinners so you can serve it with mashed potatoes, maple-glazed carrots, green beans and peas. Or why not try a fresh twist on a classic side salad and whip up a vibrant mango salsa with fresh mango mixed with avocado, red onion, coriander, and freshly squeezed lime.

name: Achara
long_description:
Certified Organic Happiness in a Jar!

Love Organics multi award winning Achara is full of certified organic fermented goodness to keep your gut and tastebuds happy! 
  • Certified Organic
  • Certified Vegan
  • Probiotic Boosted
  • Aged Fermented
  • Handcrafted
  • Non Pasteurised
  • 5.25 Billion CFU of probiotic strainsin every 35g serve
A tropical mix of green papaya, pineapple and chilli. Infused with kelp, coriander and finished off with a hint of lemongrass. Love Organics Achara is a unique ferment for the adventurous foodie. A little bit of heat with a little bit of sweet and a lovely tang and crispness that will leave you wanting more.

Love Organics Achara is packed with superfood ingredients such as papaya, nigella, hemp seed and kelp. In addition to the wild occurring biota, Love Organics Achara is also boosted with three probiotic strains that are Australian made, certified organic and TGA approved, helping to create a powerful functional fermentation.

Love Organics Achara is an Australian made artisan product, handcrafted with love and aged fermented for maximum depth of flavour. 

Serving Suggestion:

Add a generous serving of Love Organics Achara to anything that has a little bit more richness or fat.  The tang of this ferment will cut through those flavours and complement almost any dish.  Try it tossed through a Thai beef salad, or add it to your protein meal for the day.  Papain from the green papaya is known for its ability to help digest proteins.
  • Certified Organic

  • Certified Vegan

  • Probiotic Boosted

  • Aged Fermented

  • Handcrafted

  • Non Pasteurised.

  • 5.25 Billion CFU of probiotic strains in every 35g serve.

  • Australian Made.
ingredients: Daikon, Green Papaya, Capsicum,Pineapple, Australian Sea Salt, Chilli, Garlic, Ginger, Hemp Seed, Coriander, Kelp, Lemon Grass, Nigella Seed, L. plantarum, L. rhamnosus, L. paracasei.

name: Double Pack
long_description:
At OB Finest, we believe in quality without compromise, offering entertainers a refined, sophisticated touch that will please any connoisseur. Our range helps you create memorable experiences marked with your signature flair. Our Specialty Crackers are masterfully crafted with the finest ingredients to elevate your entertaining experience through blends of flavours and crisp textures. Savour the subtle elegance of our Wafer Crackers, masterfully crafted with a light, delicate texture that enhances, not overshadows, your flavour experience.

Dinner Parties, Birthdays, Festive Entertaining, Christmas, New Years, Easter, Spring Carnival, Mother's Day, Father's Day... whatever the occasion, OB Finest Crackers are the perfect pairing for your cheese platter or charcuterie board.

Or why not indulge in the delicious flavour combinations at any time of the year, accompanied by cheese, cold meats, olives, pickles, fruit paste, fresh fruit, dips and honey, or enjoy the unique texture and flavour of OB Finest Artisan Biscuits all by themselves.
  • Two Delicious Cracker Favourites in One Convenient Pack
